name: Dareway Software Co.,Ltd.
summary: Dareway Software Co.,Ltd. develops and offers software solution for human resources, social security, industrial, and smart power application. The company offers energy management, power consumption information, electricity demand management, and power quality management software. It also offers insurance, labor employment, public service, data exchange, decision support, information management, big data management, database disaster recovery and backup, IT quality service management, and database performance analysis solutions. It also offers system integration services. Dareway Software Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Jinan, China.
